title: humularia mendoncae var. integribracteata
intro: Humularia mendoncae var. integribracteata, a variety of the Humularia mendoncae plant, is a type of flowering plant in the yam family, Dioscoreaceae. This plant is traditionally used in West African medicine, particularly in Nigeria, where it is valued for its medicinal properties. It is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating pain. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for use in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
